# py-clob-client

Python client for Polymarket CLOB (Central Limit Order Book).

## Installation

```bash
pip install py-clob-client
```

## Usage

```python
from py_clob_client.client import ClobClient
client = ClobClient(host='https://clob.polymarket.com', key=pk, chain_id=137)
```
